title: Cleisostoma crucicallum
taxonomy: Cleisostoma crucicallum belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a species of orchid. This genus is part of the subtribe Aeridinae, which contains many species of orchids. Cleisostoma crucicallum is native to Asia, and its classification is based on its unique characteristics and morphology. Within the family Orchidaceae, Cleisostoma crucicallum is closely related to other species of orchids in the same subtribe. The classification of Cleisostoma crucicallum is subject to ongoing research and taxonomic revisions.
